identity.name: Panaderia Moderna
identity.description: A modern Filipino bakery platform that feels like a warm hug. It blends traditional hospitality with modern convenience.

grids.hero_tetris: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 h-auto md:h-[80vh]

buttons.primary: bg-bakery-cocoa text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-bakery-cocoa/90 transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-lg shadow-bakery-cocoa/20
buttons.secondary: bg-bakery-flour text-bakery-cocoa rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-bakery-latte/50 transition-all border border-bakery-cocoa/10
buttons.ghost: text-bakery-cocoa hover:bg-bakery-flour/50 rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors

cards.product: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-bakery-cocoa/5 transition-all duration-300 border border-stone-100 group cursor-pointer
cards.feature: bg-bakery-flour/30 rounded-3xl p-8 border border-bakery-cocoa/5 hover:border-bakery-cocoa/10 transition-colors

inputs.default: rounded-xl border-bakery-latte/50 bg-white px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-bakery-cocoa/20 focus:border-bakery-cocoa outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-stone-400

navigation.header: fixed top-4 left-4 right-4 md:left-8 md:right-8 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md rounded-full shadow-sm border border-white/20 z-50 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between

icons.payment_fallback: Use text labels 'GCash' (Blue) and 'Maya' (Green) if SVGs are unavailable.

date_picker.style: Use Shadcn Calendar but customize with rounded-2xl and brand colors. Don't use default radius.
date_picker.logic: Must allow blocking past dates. Highlight 'Today' with accent color.

qr_display.style: Display QR code in a clean white card with 'Scan to Pay' instruction. Add a 'Download QR' button below it.
qr_display.visibility: Must be 100% width on mobile for easy scanning.

guest_checkout.flow: Single page form. No multi-step wizards if possible. Keep it frictionless.
guest_checkout.fields: Name, Address (TextArea), Contact Number (Tel input), Delivery Date/Time.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Install fonts immediately in index.css using the Google Fonts URL provided.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Configure tailwind.config.js to extend the color palette with the 'bakery' object defined in colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Create a 'Layout' component that wraps the app with the specific creamy background color.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Use the 'tetris' grid for the Landing Page Hero section to showcase the cake images.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: For the Admin Dashboard, switch to a denser grid but keep the warm typography to maintain brand consistency.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid warm cream colors or subtle noise textures.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.transitions: Use specific transitions (e.g., transition-colors, transition-transform) not transition-all.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.alignment: Avoid center-aligning text unless it's a short headline. Left-align body text for readability.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.spacing: Use comfortable spacing (p-6, p-8) inside cards. Don't cram content.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.motion: Add subtle entrance animations (fade-in-up) for product grids.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.accessibility: Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA. The brown text on cream background is designed for this.
